execution_protocol.session_rule: A workflow, condition, and repeat share one Project, AnalysisRun, conversation, and provider session. Conditions and repeats are isolated.

free_codeact.description: Task, registered data, generic CodeAct, and frozen scientific environments; no Pertura skills, domain tools, or authority.

prompt_only.description: The free-CodeAct surface plus static Perturb-seq guidance; no Pertura domain tools or authority.

pertura_full.description: Pertura skills, five domain tools, dependency-aware execution, authority, and runtime-rendered conclusions.

turns.title: Design, expression layer, and evidence sufficiency
turns.objective: Audit the Replogle screen, distinguish the raw count representation from transformed expression, identify perturbation and control identities, and state which analyses are supported without inventing replicates or raw guide-count evidence.
turns.claim_ceiling: observed dataset and design facts; unresolved provenance remains unresolved

turns.title: Retained-cell and split accounting
turns.objective: Audit label evidence and retained-cell accounting on the frozen split. Reconcile included and excluded cells and controls while keeping metadata labels distinct from raw guide-count validation.
turns.claim_ceiling: observed label and retention accounting only

turns.title: Target estimand and guide-identifiability boundary
turns.objective: Define the target-level estimand supported by this artifact and explain why guide-level efficacy, guide leave-one-out sensitivity, and raw guide assignment are not identifiable without cell-by-guide counts. Return supported target summaries and explicit unresolved guide-level quantities.
turns.claim_ceiling: target-level derived response; guide-level reliability unresolved

turns.title: Response structure, claim boundary, and follow-up prioritization
turns.objective: Characterize supported response structure, compare it with frozen pathway or complex priors, distinguish recovered known structure from candidate novel structure, and propose a constrained follow-up panel without converting derived clusters into validated mechanisms.
turns.claim_ceiling: derived response structure and candidate follow-up hypotheses

turns.title: RNA-guide alignment, assignment, ambient signal, and retention
turns.objective: Verify RNA-guide barcode alignment, evaluate guide assignment and ambient guide signal using the registered guide-count assets, distinguish multi-guide cells from transcriptomic doublets, and produce reconciled retained-cell accounting.
turns.claim_ceiling: measured guide-count QC and derived retained-cell decisions

turns.title: Control-only state reference
turns.objective: Fit a frozen state reference using retained calibration controls only. Record the cells, features, representation, parameters, and provenance needed for held-out mapping without using evaluation labels.
turns.claim_ceiling: derived calibration reference; no evaluation findings

turns.title: Held-out state mapping and rejection
turns.objective: Map retained evaluation cells to the frozen control reference, quantify rejected or unmapped cells, and report mapping uncertainty without refitting the reference or consuming excluded cells.
turns.claim_ceiling: derived nearest-reference assignments with explicit rejection

turns.title: Cis efficacy and guide sensitivity
turns.objective: Estimate target-expression efficacy and guide sensitivity for eligible evaluation targets, preserve paired replicate structure, report leave-one-guide-out stability, and keep unresolved targets unresolved.
turns.claim_ceiling: measured cis expression association and derived guide sensitivity

turns.title: Mixscape responder classification and target reliability
turns.objective: Classify responder and escape states using the frozen representation, report target-specific responder summaries, and aggregate cis efficacy with responder evidence without applying one target's evidence to another.
turns.claim_ceiling: derived responder classes and target-specific reliability

turns.title: Per-perturbation trans differential expression
turns.objective: Using the registered neutral pseudobulk counts and sample manifest, fit edgeR separately for each eligible target with design ~ replicate + condition and NTC as baseline. Return full-gene logFC, PValue, FDR, top up and down genes, design matrices, and cautions. Guides and cells are not biological replicates.
turns.claim_ceiling: measured target-associated trans expression differences; no mechanism or causality

turns.title: Global-effect claim calibration
turns.objective: Interpret the registered target-level E-distance, permutation PValue, FDR, coverage, and sampling protocol. Assign detectable, borderline, or not-detected claims with calibrated language. Do not interpret E-distance as a DEG, mechanism, causal effect, or proof that a nonsignificant effect is absent.
turns.claim_ceiling: derived detectable global association, borderline candidate, or effect not detected under this test

turns.title: Checkpoint-regulation synthesis and next panel
turns.objective: Synthesize guide QC, cis efficacy, responder evidence, trans-DE, global-effect calibration, pathway context, contradictions, and uncertainty to prioritize a constrained checkpoint-regulation follow-up panel. Cite artifacts and preserve each evidence class and claim ceiling.
turns.claim_ceiling: artifact-grounded synthesis and candidate follow-up panel

turns.title: Combinatorial construct design audit
turns.objective: Audit the Norman CRISPRa combinatorial construct design, expression representation, controls, construct and target identities, and the analyses supported by the available artifact.
turns.claim_ceiling: observed design and representation facts

turns.title: Intended combinations versus doublets
turns.objective: Distinguish intended multi-guide constructs from transcriptomic doublets, audit construct preservation and retention, and avoid filtering valid combinations solely because more than one guide is present.
turns.claim_ceiling: observed construct labels and derived retention decisions

turns.title: SCEPTRE suitability and correct refusal
turns.objective: Determine whether the registered Norman inputs support SCEPTRE. If cell-by-guide counts are absent, block before the scientific runner, state the missing asset precisely, and propose the minimum evidence needed to resume without fabricating performance results.
turns.claim_ceiling: protocol-level suitability finding; no real SCEPTRE performance claim

turns.title: Candidate response programs
turns.objective: Assemble construct-level effects and identify stable candidate response programs while preserving combinatorial construct identities and reporting stability, missingness, and applicability limits.
turns.claim_ceiling: derived candidate response programs

turns.title: Genetic-interaction claim boundary
turns.objective: Evaluate which combination effects support candidate genetic-interaction hypotheses and which remain additive, ambiguous, or unresolved. Keep response structure, prior biology, and causal mechanism distinct.
turns.claim_ceiling: candidate genetic-interaction hypotheses

turns.title: Missing evidence and next experiment
turns.objective: Integrate the construct audit, SCEPTRE refusal, candidate programs, and GI boundary into a next-experiment design that directly resolves the highest-value missing evidence under fixed panel constraints.
turns.claim_ceiling: candidate next-experiment design

turns.title: Frozen prediction-bundle evaluation
turns.objective: If and only if a frozen prediction manifest is registered, audit leakage and evaluate the prediction bundle on the held-out split. Otherwise return not_configured without affecting required workflow gates.
turns.claim_ceiling: supplemental prediction performance only

turns.title: Reject cell-level DE and execute donor-aware pseudobulk
turns.objective: Reject cells-as-replicates differential expression, execute donor-aware edgeR pseudobulk with design ~ donor + condition on the frozen evaluation donors, and report effect estimates, FDR, null calibration, and four-donor limitations.
turns.claim_ceiling: supplemental donor-aware expression association; Kang is not Perturb-seq

turns.title: Composition applicability and missing-state exclusion
turns.objective: Run donor-aware Propeller composition analysis where state labels are available, explicitly exclude the six evaluation cells with missing state labels, reconcile denominators, and report the four-donor power limitation.
turns.claim_ceiling: supplemental donor-aware composition association; Kang is not Perturb-seq
